ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Present Value (swap) - (PRSNT_VL)
ChangeRequest.comment:
According to the instructions (Annex XVII, pag.26):
"_Present Value (swap) shall be the sum of claims to payment of principal and interest, as discounted by a foreign exchange-specific risk-free yield curve, determined in accordance with the relevant statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage [...]_"
It is required in template F 35.00.a (Liabilities: Debt securities issued, all assets).
Currently, this metric isn't in the LDM; it is a new requirement to be included for _Debt securities_, _Loans and advances_, equities.
